title: TerraMon
description: A Cobblemon modpack for you to enjoy :). It features everything you need to get the full Pokémon experience with no shortcuts!
body:
A Cobblemon modpack designed for an authentic Pokémon adventure! This pack includes everything you need to experience Pokémon in Minecraft with no shortcuts, offering a true challenge.

I created this modpack to ensure you get a real Pokémon adventure, while keeping things fair and not too overpowered.

![TerraMon](https://turboot.com/assets/img/minecraft/terramon.jpg)

---
### Socials:

- [Discord](https://discord.gg/QdWQQpDzTw)
- [Github](https://github.com/Turbootzz)

---

Feel free to use it in singleplayer or in a server!
